title: globularia trichosantha subsp. longisepala
intro: Globularia trichosantha subsp. longisepala, also known as a type of globe daisy, is a flowering plant species in the family Plantaginaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting liver function. Globularia trichosantha subsp. longisepala can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
